steps.title: Identify the slope of line k
steps.content: Line $k$ has equation $y = 7x + \frac{1}{8}$. In slope-intercept form $y = mx + b$, the coefficient of $x$ is the slope, so line $k$ has slope \$7$.

steps.title: Apply the perpendicular slope rule
steps.content: When two lines are perpendicular, their slopes are negative reciprocals. For line $k$ with slope \$7$, the perpendicular line $j$ has slope: $$-\frac{1}{7}$$ That matches choice B — B is correct.
